title: AQUALONA® Premium Thermoplastic Toilet Seat Soft Close Hardwearing Seat with One Button Hinge Release D Shaped Easy to Clean Simple Installation Top and Bottom Fittings (White - D Shape)
features: THERMOPLASTIC TOILET SEAT- The Aqualona Thermoplastic Toilet Seat is durable and designed to complement your bathroom. The hard-wearing plastic seat is virtually unbreakable, fade-resistant, hygienic, easy to wipe down and has a smooth appearance.

SOFT AND SLOW CLOSE - The Thermoplastic Toilet Seat features rust-resistant soft close hinges to stop loud slamming noise while the slow-close endurance saves time and minimises wear and tear. Each Aqualona toilet seat is anti-fatigue stress tested 50000 times for repeated open and close use.

Universal Fit: Measuring 45cm x 36.1cm. With fully adjustable hinges to fit in the toilet pan holes ranging from 12.2cm - 21.8cm. When installed correctly, the toilet seat will securely fit to the toilet pan without moving.

D SHAPE DESIGN - The Thermoplastic seat is made has an D shape design to perfectly fit almost any D shaped toilet. Durable rust-proof stainless steel hinges ensure the perfect fit and provide support for up to 150kg.

EASY INSTALLATION - Easily fit the plastic toilet seat! This seat features 360-degree adjustable rotation hinges on top and bottom, plus rubber based with tight-grip plastic locking plugs to keep the seat firmly in place. A quick hinge release ensures that the seat is easily detached for easy cleaning.
TOP AND BOTTOM FIXING - Compatible with toilets that have holes for fixing on the top or underneath.

STAINLESS STEEL CAPS - For covering the fixings, attractive and easy to clean. These stainless steel caps certainly add a touch of quality and style to the overall look of the seat, whether open or closed.
description: Product Description Soft Close Our soft close hinges ensure the seat closes slowly and quietly. Preventing loud bangs and minimising disruption. Quick Release & Easy Clean Simply click, lift and clean. It's that simple! Easy Installation Clear and simple fitting instructions included with every toilet seat. 360° Degrees Hinges 360° hinges makes installing even simpler. Simply adjust the hinges to allow your new toilet seat to sit perfectly on your toilet pan. D Shape Toilet Seat Before purchasing your new toilet seat, check the shape of your toilet seat to ensure it will fit with your toilet pan. D Shape Toilet Pan This D shape toilet seat is suitable for a D shape toilet pan. Made from Thermoplastic Made from hard-wearing, durable thermoplastic. Modern Finish This modern toilet seat will look great in any bathroom.
